{{Infobox character
| name = Incarnation of Elysia
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Territory]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Incarnation of Elysia]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Incarnation]] of [[Elysia]] is a title held by [[Alin]], the son of [[Torin]]. As an individual born as a [[Traveler]] from one of the most potent [[Territories]], [[Alin]] possesses immense power that is considered nearly impossible to halt. While [[Elysian]] [[Travelers]] are traditionally viewed as the highest examples of human virtue and were once responsible for overseeing all other [[Territories]] and managing [[Incarnations]] that entered the world, the [[Incarnation]] itself is described as a ruler lacking both conscience and empathy. This entity functions as an absolute monarch who possesses no internal restraint or opposition. Historically, the first [[Incarnation]] of [[Elysia]] was a figure who nearly caused the destruction of [[Damasca]]. Although it is believed that a single [[Territory]] can only host one [[Incarnation]] at any given time, [[Alin]] claims the identity of [[Elysia]] and expresses a desire to destroy his enemies. The [[Incarnation]] has resided in the city for an extended period and has been observed in a weakened state.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] serves as the [[Incarnation]] of [[Elysia]], a being possessing enough power to match the blue giant. Due to her [[Territory]], she is characterized by an honesty that borders on being too blunt. [[Feiora Torannus]] once witnessed the [[Incarnation]] limping away, and it is known that the [[King]] has already formulated plans regarding her existence.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] is the [[Incarnation of Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Incarnation of Elysia]] is a figure that [[Feiora Torannus]] observed limping away.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Incarnation of Elysia]] was honest to a fault due to her [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[King]] has planned for the [[Incarnation of Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Incarnation of Elysia]] is a being that could match the blue giant.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
